creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Glen Barber from comment #6)

Unless the some lang/python3* package are already being intentionally/explicitly installed, we won't to install the lang/python3 package, as it will pull in the default lang/python3 package (as its a dependency).

If only lang/python27 is being provided in the images for now, then only lang/python2 and lang/python (convenience symlinks) should be installed
